events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: phase tape colors wrong on feeders and branch circuits, rough-complete stage. NEC 200.6 requires grounded conductors to be identified (white/gray). NEC 210.5 requires ungrounded conductors to be identified by phase. Wrong phase tape colors = non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: medium (could cause misidentification, safety hazard). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 85. Value: 0 (no numeric reading). Confidence high.
